mapper.sql: id, tenant_id, order_no, toc_user_id, plan_id, order_status, amount, paid_at, channel, created_at
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM vip_order WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO vip_order ( tenant_id, order_no, toc_user_id, plan_id, order_status, amount, paid_at, channel ) VALUES ( #{tenantId}, #{orderNo}, #{tocUserId}, #{planId}, #{orderStatus}, #{amount}, #{paidAt}, #{channel} )
